added: // This can fail if a duplicate of this transaction was in a chain that got
// reorganized away. This is only possible if this transaction was completely
// spent, so erasing it would be a no-op anway.

cve_description: The Bitcoin protocol, as used in bitcoind before 0.4.4, wxBitcoin, Bitcoin-Qt, and other programs, does not properly handle multiple transactions with the same identifier, which allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (unspendable transaction) by leveraging the ability to create a duplicate coinbase transaction.
